issue_statement: Engineering projection still lacks one canonical ownership relation shape and explicit unknown-link handling.
expected_outcome: SCE defines one ownership relation shape for later projection work without introducing a parallel ownership registry.
impact_scope: engineering ownership projection, app/workspace/device relation modeling, later state-tier work
reproduction_steps: Observe that ownership links are not yet normalized into one stable relation shape
Observe that adapters would otherwise guess or duplicate ownership state locally
forbidden_workarounds: Do not create an adapter-owned ownership registry
Do not widen delivery projection scope inside this spec
